diaspora.title: Green Card abroad quickstart
diaspora.description: Choose the country where the accident happened. We show the first steps, emergency numbers, and the fastest path into support or claim start.

selector.label: Choose country
selector.hint: Use the country where the accident happened.

guidance.firstStepsHint: Do these before you leave the scene whenever it is safe to do so.

actions.title: Next move
actions.description: Use direct support if you need help now, or start the travel claim so triage begins in the existing member flow.

boundary.title: What this quickstart does
boundary.description: This is the bounded member quickstart for accident-abroad handling.
boundary.pointOne: It gives first guidance and routes you into the current support and claim flows.
boundary.pointTwo: It does not replace staff review, legal evaluation, or country-specific insurer handling.
